meta.title: A Discussion with former FCC Chairman Reed Hundt
meta.description: Reed Hundt, former Chairman of the Federal Communications Commission, is coauthor with Blair Levin of a new book,The Politics of Abundance: How Technology Can Fix the Budget, Revive the American Dream, and Establish Obama's Legacy (Odyssey Editions, 2012). Hundt will discuss his new book and his views on policies that affect the future of technology. From 1993-1997, Reed Hundt was Chairman of the FCC. Previously he was a partner at Latham & Watkins. Hundt is currently the CEO of the
